text:
Created attachment 207208
mail/phplist update to 3.4.5

There is new version of phplist. I've made a patch which updates mail/phplist. Also tested with poudriere and portlint

portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Consider to set DEVELOPER=yes in /etc/make.conf
0 fatal errors and 3 warnings found.

Logfile from poudriere is attached
